product_name: Gyeon Q²m Leathercleaner Strong Güçlü Deri Temizleyici - 500 ml -Mat Görünüm Deri Koltuk Temizleme

sources.cleaned_content:
Q2M LEATHERCLEANER STRONG

Category: Interior / maintenance

Strong leather cleaner for deep cleaning and preparation.

Q2M LeatherCleaner Strong is an effective cleaner developed to remove heavy dirt, oily residue and discolouration from automotive leather. It is designed as a preparation step before applying leather coatings and leaves the surface fully matte and free of residues.

Product Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_leather-cleaner-strong_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png
Banner Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600q2mleathercleanerstrong-1920x1152.webp
Technical Detail Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mleathercleanerstrong.webp

Strong, effective and safe leather cleaner.

Q2M LeatherCleaner Strong provides deep cleaning where gentle maintenance products are not sufficient. It prepares leather upholstery for protective coatings without softening the surface or altering its natural feel.

Benefits:
- QUICK AND EFFECTIVE
- REMOVES DIRT AND STAINS
- STRONG CLEANING ACTION

TECHNICAL DETAILS

Capacities: 500 ML / 1000 ML
Consumption: 100ml/car

HOW TO USE

01. Apply Q2M LeatherCleaner Strong to a leather brush or pad.
02. Work the product into the leather surface gently.
03. Wipe away loosened contamination with a microfibre towel.
04. Repeat on heavily soiled areas if needed.
05. Proceed with leather protection after cleaning.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

01. When should Q2M LeatherCleaner Strong be used?
When leather is heavily soiled or before coating application.

02. Does it leave residue on the leather?
No. It leaves a clean, matte surface.

03. Is it safe for modern automotive leather?
Yes. It is designed for modern leather upholstery.

04. Can it be used on coated leather?
Yes. It cleans without removing coatings.

05. Is it suitable for regular maintenance?
It is intended for deeper cleaning rather than daily use.

- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-strong-b-1548x1430_1430x1430.webp?v=1769603234
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-strong-a-1548x1430_1430x1430.webp?v=1769603234
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-strong-500m_1548x1430.jpg?v=1769603234
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-strong-1l_1548x1430.jpg?v=1769603234

We Say

While Gyeon Q2M LeatherCleaner Neutral does an excellent job of cleaning leather that is in good condition and maintained to a high standard, its gentle formula can struggle when faced with heavier levels of soiling and neglect. In such cases it's worth reaching for Gyeon Q2M LeatherCleaner Strong instead, as its more concentrated detergent-based formula cuts through ingrained grease and grime with ease. Like its sibling, it doesn't alter the leather's surface in any way, nor leave any residue behind.

Key Features

Agitation Required: Yes (See How To Use)
Cleaning Strength: 10/10 (Compared To Others)
Dilutable: No (Ready To Use)

Description

Gyeon Q2M LeatherCleaner Strong is a powerful detergent-based cleaning solution for leather upholstery. It doesn't contain any conditioning agents or preserving additives, meaning it cleans without softening the leather in any way or leaving any residue behind. As a result, Gyeon Q2M LeatherCleaner Strong is the perfect preparatory product for leather coatings such as Gyeon Q2 LeatherShield in cases where the surfaces to be treated are heavily soiled and showing other obvious signs of neglect.

Specification

Agitation Required: Yes
Chemical Basis: Detergent-based
Cleaning Strength: 10
Dilutable: No
Maximum Dwelling Time: 5 minutes
Suitable For: Leather surfaces (all types)
pH: 12 (alkaline)

How To Use

For best results, Gyeon Q2M LeatherCleaner Strong should be sprayed on to a PB Utility Towel and then wiped over the leather surfaces in straight lines using light to moderate pressure. Stubborn soiling may sometimes require a deeper clean using a Gyeon Q2M LeatherBrush, again using light to moderate pressure but this time working in tight circles. To finish off, wipe up any excess product with a PB Utility Towel and then leave the leather to dry fully before applying any form of protection.

- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Leather-Cleaner-Strong-500-ml_1515_1_lw_6426.jpg

Product Information

- Deep cleans your leather safely!
- Remove dirt, grime, human oils, etc.
- No softening or preserving additives
- Helps you clean and prep leather prior to leather coatings
- Product Code: GY-3309

Product Description

The Gyeon Leather Cleaner Strong will allow you to deep clean your leather so it looks and feels great. You can easily remove dirt, grime and oily residue with the unique formula that does not contain any softening or preserving additives. Leather Cleaner is safe on all modern types of leather and comes in two cleaning options, strong and mild. Strong works best on notably soiled leather surfaces, while mild is perfect for maintenance cleanings. For added cleaning power, Gyeon recommends using the Gyeon Leather Brush to work in the formula. This high-quality formula also helps prep your leather if you want to apply a leather coating like Gyeon Leather Coat afterward. Gyeon Leather Cleaner Strong is a great product that you'll enjoy using to make your leather look like new again.

Cleaning Options:
- Leather Cleaner Strong - Designed to clean heavily soiled leather areas.
- Leather Cleaner Mild - Best suited for lightly soiled leather or as a maintenance cleaner.

Professional Detailer Reviews

Gyeon Leather Cleaner was really a breeze to use. It made quick, easy work of this dirty seat. The product has a pleasant scent that is not too strong, and I barely used any product to clean this seat so the bottle will tackle many jobs. Gyeon claims that this product is safe to use on all modern leathers, and it is gentle enough to be used on top of a leather coating without harming or removing the coating. This cleaner does not contain any additives such as softeners or preservers, so it is an ideal option to use to prepare a surface prior to applying a leather coating.
- Product Review: Gyeon Leather Cleaner by Zach McGovern

From The Label

Product Description: Strong and efficient pre-coating cleaner for all types of modern automotive leather upholstery. DO NOT USE ON NATURAL OR SEMI-ANILINE LEATHER.

Directions: Vacuum upholstery before cleaning. For light contamination, spray on Q2M LeatherWipe Evo and wipe panel by panel. Otherwise, spray on a small area and clean with Q2M ScrubPad. Remove dirt in a straight motion. Wipe with a lightly damp cloth to remove excess of product. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

Customer Reviews

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 4 ratings)

Reviewed by Kevin H. on 4/14/2025 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Gyeon Leather Cleaner Strong is the perfect product for cleaning leather. Super easy to use and very effective. 10/10 would recommend!

Reviewed by Ben L. on 1/11/2019 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
The positive reviews of Gyeon Leather are SPOT ON! The red leather on my Maserati GranTurismo MC showed a significant amount of grime in the creases from past owners and is difficult to care for. I hit it with a brush and microfiber with this cleaner and the finished product was a amazing. Leather looked clean, soft, and supple. It just popped. I was amazed at the difference. I finished up with Gyeon coating to protect.

Reviewed by Antonio F. on 10/29/2018 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Gyeon Leather Cleaner is, by a large margin, the best leather cleaner that I've ever used. Spray it on liberally, and agitate, then simply wipe away. We utilized this product on cashmere-colored leather to remove dye transfer from denim with ease. It also easily removes bodily oils, spills, and pretty much anything else that you might spill in your interior. I highly recommend that anyone use this product with a Rupes iBrid Nano w/ the soft nylon cup brush. It foams up nicely and makes cleanup a breeze.

STRONG CLEAN FOR ANY TYPE OF LEATHER

Q2M LeatherCleaner Strong stands as the ultimate solution for cleaning and preparing leather upholstery for the application of a ceramic coating. Free from softening additives and residue, it ensures no interference with the quality of a ceramic coating. Q2M LeatherCleaner leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather, including vegan leather.

Safe deep clean

Q2M LeatherCleaner Strong is an efficient and effective pre-coating leather cleaner, developed in tandem with Gyeon's high-end Q2 LeatherShield. It stands as the ultimate leather preparation product for use before a coating application, removing dirt, oily residue, and discoloration. Unlike most leather cleaners, the formula excludes any softening or preserving additives, leaving the surface ready for coating.

Product Description

Q2M Leather Cleaner Strong is an efficient and effective pre-coating leather cleaner. Developed along with Gyeon's high-end Q2 Leather Shield, it is the ultimate leather preparation product for use before a coating application. It removes dirt, oily residue and discolouration. Unlike most leather cleaners, the formula does not include any softening or preserving additives, leaving a surface ready for coating.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Always vacuum the upholstery first. Use Q2M Leather Cleaner Strong along with water, to increase the foam and help distributing the cleaner. Use the Q2M Leather Brush. Work in sections. TIP: Always remove dirt with a microfibre in straight motion. Use at least 3 towels: for the initial wipe, a damp one to remove suds and another one to dry the surface.

CONSUMPTION: 100ml/car
PH LEVEL: 10

STRONG CLEAN FOR ANY TYPE OF LEATHER

Q2M Leather Cleaner Strong is the ultimate solution for cleaning and preparing leather upholstery for application of a quartz coating. It does not contain any softening additives and does not leave any residue that could potentially interfere with a quality quartz coating. Q2M Leather Cleaner leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather.

Works on vinyl and plastics

Start by vacuuming the upholstery. Mix Q2M LeatherCleaner Strong with water to increase foam and aid in distributing the cleaner. Apply the solution using the Q2M LeatherBrush, working in sections. TIP: Remove dirt with a microfiber in a straight motion. Utilize at least three towels: one for the initial wipe, a damp one to remove suds, and another one to dry the surface.

FAQ

Does it work on aniline and semi-aniline leather?
Leather Cleaner Mild & Strong only works with 'finished' or coated automotive leather. Do not use on Aniline un-coated leather or semi aniline leather. Use GYEON LeatherCleaner Natural instead, this one's safe on aniline and semi-aniline.

Will it remove dye transfer?
Yes and no. It depends on how long the dye has been on the leather. Leather is fairly porous, and dye can migrate into the material, making it challenging to remove. If caught within a few days, Leather Cleaner Strong can potentially remove it. However, if the dye is etched into the leather, redyeing the finish may be necessary.

Is it shiny?
No, both Leather Cleaner Strong and Mild will yield a matte finish.

What else can I clean with it?
Not limited to leather, it can also clean plastics, vinyl, vegan leather, dashboards, and trim.

Does it lather?
Yes, it will lather when agitated with a brush and works in a foaming bottle as well.

What's the difference between Mild and Strong?
Mild is excellent for maintenance, while Strong can effectively remove leather protection products for a full strip and deep clean. Though Strong has slightly higher pH, but it won't damage anything, it's safe-strong.
